summary: Completed testing of Calendar and Workers features for iteration 14. All 13 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Calendar month/week/day views with booking badges and colored borders, Workers Stats tab with 'Jelenléti ív' (Attendance PDF) button, Shift edit dialog with shift_type selector (Munkanap/Szabadság/Betegszabadság), Day Management with PDF download.

issues: shift_type selector is only available in edit dialog, not in create dialog - this is by design but could be improved for UX

passed_tests: Backend API - POST /api/shifts with shift_type='normal' creates shift correctly
Backend API - POST /api/shifts with shift_type='vacation' creates vacation shift
Backend API - POST /api/shifts with shift_type='sick_leave' creates sick leave shift
Backend API - PUT /api/shifts/{id} updates shift_type correctly
Backend API - GET /api/shifts/attendance-report returns correct structure with worker shifts, total_hours, normal_days, vacation_days, sick_days
Backend API - GET /api/shifts/attendance-report correctly deducts lunch time from total hours
Backend API - GET /api/shifts/leave-stats returns vacation and sick leave counts per worker
Backend API - GET /api/bookings with date_from/date_to parameters works
Backend API - GET /api/stats/worker-monthly returns worker statistics
Frontend - Calendar month view shows booking count badges on days with bookings
Frontend - Calendar month view clicking on day navigates to day view
Frontend - Calendar week view shows bookings with plate numbers and colored left borders
Frontend - Workers Stats tab shows 'Jelenléti ív' (Attendance PDF) button
Frontend - Workers Stats tab shows 'PDF letöltés' (Worker PDF) button
Frontend - Shift edit dialog has 'Típus' selector with Munkanap/Szabadság/Betegszabadság options
Frontend - Day Management page has PDF download and email buttons
critical_code_review_comments: Consider adding shift_type selector to new shift creation dialog for better UX (currently only in edit dialog)
seed_data_creation: Created test shifts in January 2026 with different shift_types (normal, vacation, sick_leave) for testing attendance report and leave stats APIs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 tested Calendar and Workers features. Key features verified: 1) Calendar month view with booking count badges and day navigation, 2) Calendar week view with colored booking borders, 3) Workers Stats tab with 'Jelenléti ív' (Attendance PDF) button that calls /api/shifts/attendance-report, 4) Shift edit dialog with shift_type selector (Munkanap/Szabadság/Betegszabadság), 5) Backend APIs /api/shifts/attendance-report and /api/shifts/leave-stats working correctly. Test shifts created in January 2026 for Test Worker Debrecen.
